metadata.title: A Rate-Distortion View of Uncertainty Quantification

figures.description: Uncertainty visualization in regression showing prediction, ground truth, and uncertainty bands
Training dataset as source points in Rd space
Mapping datapoints to a distribution through stochastic encoder
Codebook containing centroids in terms of statistical distance
Uncertainty quantified by expected distance from codebook

tables.description: Performance comparison table on ImageNet 1-K showing AUROC, Accuracy and Parameters

sections.title: Key Idea: Distance-Awareness
content: How far is an input example from the training dataset?

figures.description: Bar chart showing distance from training manifold for different datasets

sections.title: Codebook Visualization
content: Number of CIFAR-10 test datapoints assigned to each centroid during training. Each centroid progressively attracts datapoints of the same class.

figures.description: Heatmaps of codebook centroids over training epochs

sections.title: References
content: [1] Alemi, A. A., Fischer, I., Dillon, J. V., and Murphy, K. Deep variational information bottleneck. In International Conference on Learning Representations, 2017.[2] Alemi, A. A., Fischer, I., and Dillon, J. V. Uncertainty in the variational information bottleneck. arXiv preprint arXiv:1807.00906, 2018.[3] Liu, J., Lin, Z., Padhy, S., Tran, D., Bedrax Weiss, T., and Lakshminarayanan, B. Simple and principled uncertainty estimation with deterministic deep learning via distance awareness. Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems, 2020.[4] Banerjee, A., Merugu, S., Dhillon, I. S., Ghosh, J., and Lafferty, J. Clustering with Bregman divergences. Journal of Machine Learning Research, 2005.[5] Van Amersfoort, J., Smith, L., Teh, Y. W., and Gal, Y. Uncertainty estimation using a single deep deterministic neural network. In International Conference on Learning Representations, 2020.
